title: TCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Network & Monitoring , Helpdesk Support Posts
shortInfo: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL) has released the official L-2 Network & Monitoring / Helpdesk Support Notification 2026 on 20-05-2026 at tcil.net.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the TCIL L-2 Network & Monitoring / Helpdesk Support 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged up to 55 years with a qualification of B.E / B-Tech / MCA or equivalent, Science Graduate / BCA or equivalent can apply offline from 20-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

basic_details.job_title: TCIL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Network & Monitoring , Helpdesk Support Posts
basic_details.short_information: Telecommunications Consultants India Limited (TCIL) has released the official L-2 Network & Monitoring / Helpdesk Support Notification 2026 on 20-05-2026 at tcil.net.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the TCIL L-2 Network & Monitoring / Helpdesk Support 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged up to 55 years with a qualification of B.E / B-Tech / MCA or equivalent, Science Graduate / BCA or equivalent can apply offline from 20-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B-Tech/MCA or equivalent, Science Graduate/BCA or equivalent
qualification.details: L-2 Network & Monitoring: B.E / B-Tech/MCA or equivalent. Minimum 5 years of experience out of which, a minimum of 4 years relevant experience in management and monitoring of Enterprise network operation. Should have the experience of large IT – Network/ Infrastructure projects like SWAN/SecLAN/CCTNS/Bharat Net/Smart City etc. Having knowledge of Routing, Switching, Wired and Wireless Network, SDWAN technology and troubleshooting skills on LAN and Wireless Access Points. Flexible to work in 24x7 Roster. Valid Certification in CCNA/JNCA or equivalent. Helpdesk Support: Science Graduate/BCA or equivalent. Minimum 3 years of experience in Information Technology and Minimum 2 years of experience in Help Desk and NMS. Should have worked on Networking/Infra related projects. Flexible to work in 24x7 Shifts. Good understanding of SWAN network & elements and understanding ownership & responsibilities of SI, department and customer in the context of the project. Flexible to work in 24x7 Roster. Must have ITIL V4 Certified.

salary_details.details: L-2 Network & Monitoring: Rs. 34875 Per Month Helpdesk Support: Rs. 22546 Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tcil.net.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for TCIL Recruitment 2026 is 29th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the L-2 Network & Monitoring / Helpdesk Support posts in TCIL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. For L-2 Network & Monitoring, a B.E/B-Tech/MCA or equivalent is required. For Helpdesk Support, a Science Graduate/BCA or equivalent is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the TCIL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 22546 to Rs. 34875 per month, depending on the specific post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for TCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for TCIL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official TCIL website, www.tcil.net.in. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
